title: RONN Inc. JV Partner HES Secures Mega-Project Agreement in South Korea
content: RONN Inc. and its Joint Venture (JV) partner, Hydrogen Energy Systems Inc. (HES), has signed a landmark agreement with a significant South Korean chemical company for a "mega project" aimed at large-scale production of hydrogen, ammonia, nitrogen, and urea. The estimated project costs exceed USD 355 million, plus additional land procurement.
author: Analysts Account
